motto: Permitted spectrum only. Shoot to kill everything else — on the wire, never on the air.
allowed: Passive WiFi beacon scan (receive-only correlation via nmcli)
Permitted-frequency whitelist enforcement (2.4/5/6 GHz FCC UNII/ISM)
Disconnect OUR station from rogue, unpermitted, or hostile APs (nmcli dev disconnect)
Firewall block hostile IPs on the wire path (nftables)
Trust Strike autokill + hardware destroy at 100% certainty on correlated threats
Operator-initiated soft rfkill on OUR wlan only
Automatic soft rfkill when confirmed RF hostilities exceed threshold (on by default)
forbidden: Spoofed beacon frames or deceptive RF transmission
Rfkill on noise spikes without confirmed hostility markers
Tolerating APs outside FCC permitted frequency bands

auto_rfkill.note: Soft rfkill OUR radio when hostility score confirms threat — never jamming.

shoot_to_kill.note: Aggressive lawful wire-layer kill chain. No RF transmission.

disable_unhealthy_forever.note: Unhealthy RF detections are disabled forever — never allowed back.

global_pollution_cleanup.note: Passive horizon grows each cycle. Pollution ledger accumulates globally. Full operations detail logged. Wire-layer cleanup only — FCC safe.
